hero.name: Kamlesh Choudhary
hero.headline: Full Stack Engineer & AI Systems Architect
hero.subheadline: I build production-ready SaaS products with modern web stacks, secure architecture, and AI-driven systems that ship fast and scale cleanly.
hero.availability: Available for full-time roles and freelance product builds.

about.intro_p1: I am a Full Stack Engineer based in Jaipur, India, focused on building scalable SaaS products from idea to production. My work combines product thinking, strong engineering fundamentals, and execution speed using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and modern cloud tooling.
about.intro_p2: I design systems with clear architecture and secure foundations, then ship features that drive user adoption and business value. I work across frontend, backend, database, auth, payments, and deployment with an AI-systems mindset for long-term product leverage.
proof_bullets: Project-reported: Daily Habit OS is scoped to 87 total features, with 83 implemented and 4 planned.
Project-reported: Daily Habit OS feature split includes 45 user features, 32 admin features, and 10 system features.
Implemented secure production patterns including Supabase Auth, 2FA with TOTP, Row Level Security, JWT validation, AES-256-GCM encryption, and rate limiting.
Project-reported: Kiro Full Stack Intelligence Suite includes 19,540+ lines of code and is released under MIT License.

projects.name: Daily Habit OS
projects.stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Razorpay, Sentry, Vercel
projects.problem: Most habit apps fail to retain users because they do not combine accountability, motivation, and operational tooling in one cohesive system.
projects.solution: Built a production-ready full-stack habit platform with streak tracking, analytics, gamification, focus timer, social modules, shop and inventory, subscription billing, journaling, task management, and a 32+ feature admin dashboard.
outcomes: Implemented a three-tier architecture with repository and service layers for maintainability and scale.
Shipped secure auth and access flows using Supabase Auth, TOTP 2FA, and Row Level Security.
Integrated Razorpay subscriptions and production monitoring via Sentry with Vercel deployment.
metrics: Project-reported: 87 total features, with 83 implemented and 4 planned.
Project-reported: 45 user features, 32 admin features, 10 system features.
Project-reported: Launch checklist progress at 55% completion.

projects.name: NitionzPvtLtd
projects.problem: The client needed a centralized platform to manage users, KYC, investments, orders, and administrative analytics efficiently.
projects.solution: Delivered a full-stack web application with admin analytics, user management, KYC verification, order and investment plan workflows, feedback handling, and role-based authentication and authorization.
outcomes: Created a practical admin control layer for day-to-day operations and data oversight.
Implemented end-to-end auth and data workflows in a TypeScript codebase.
Improved operational clarity through consolidated dashboard and management modules.
metrics: Project-reported quantitative metrics were not publicly disclosed.

projects.name: Kiro Powers
projects.stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
projects.problem: Early-stage SaaS founders need practical, reusable systems to move faster across research, engineering, and product design.
projects.solution: Built an open-source CTO-in-a-box project featuring three production-grade powers: web research guidance, full-stack intelligence workflows, and UI design intelligence patterns.
outcomes: Published an MIT-licensed open-source project with a premium portfolio experience.
Implemented modern visual systems including glassmorphism styling, smooth animation, custom cursor behavior, and particle backgrounds.
Optimized for discoverability with structured content and performance-aware page architecture.
metrics: Project-reported: Kiro Full Stack Intelligence Suite has 19,540+ lines of code.
Project-reported: Open-source distribution under MIT License.

skills.applied_value: I build fast, clean, and conversion-ready interfaces with production-level UX and maintainable component architecture.
I design backend workflows that are predictable, secure, and aligned with product outcomes and business logic.
I create data models and access policies that support scaling, correctness, and operational visibility.
I treat security as a product feature by building robust authentication, authorization, and data protection layers.

items: Repository, service, middleware, and provider patterns
skills.applied_value: I ship systems with clear architecture, stable deployment practices, and observability for long-term reliability.

supporting_skills.note: Used to improve metadata quality and page-level discoverability; not a core service line.
Comfortable with setup and page-level customization; not a primary delivery stack.

services.title: Full-Stack SaaS Development
services.description: Build complete SaaS products from frontend to backend with production-focused architecture and fast iteration cycles.

services.title: AI-Enabled Product Systems
services.description: Design and integrate AI-driven workflows and intelligence features that improve product decision-making and user value.

services.title: Secure Authentication and Access Control
services.description: Implement robust auth systems with 2FA, role-based access, and secure data handling patterns.

services.title: Admin Dashboards and Internal Tools
services.description: Create operational dashboards for analytics, user management, content control, and business workflows.

services.title: Payments and Subscription Integration
services.description: Integrate billing, subscriptions, and payment workflows using Razorpay and reliable webhook handling.

services.title: Launch and Production Hardening
services.description: Prepare applications for launch with monitoring, deployment setup, checklist-driven stabilization, and post-launch support.

cta.heading: Build Your Next Product With a Delivery-Focused Engineer
cta.body: I am available for full-time roles and project-based collaborations. If you need a builder who can own architecture, implementation, and delivery, let's connect.
links: Contact: Email and phone available on request.
